name: Steve Daines
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,829,026 for Steve Daines in U.S. Senate, MT. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
